content:
FINAL EXECUTION MODE

Do not generate another audit.

Do not summarize.

Do not explain.

Execute until production matches GitHub.

Tasks:

1. Resolve GitHub → Render synchronization.

2. Force deployment of latest GitHub commit.

3. Wait until Render reports the new deployed SHA.

4. Verify:

GitHub SHA
=
Render SHA
=
/health SHA
=
/version SHA

5. Re-test every feature that is currently UNVERIFIED or FAILED:

- Featured Properties
- Property Details
- Registration
- Member Registration
- Email Verification
- SMS Verification
- Member Dashboard
- Investor Dashboard
- CRM
- JV Deals
- Property Admin
- Media Upload
- Instagram Cards
- Likes
- Comments
- Shares
- Saves
- Analytics
- Public Chat API
- Watchdog

6. Automatically repair every failing route.

7. Redeploy.

8. Re-test.

Repeat until every feature is VERIFIED or BLOCKED with real evidence.

Output ONLY:

GitHub SHA
Render Deploy ID
Render SHA
Health SHA
Version SHA
Commit Match
HTTP status for every feature
Open blockers
Final Status

Never use placeholder values.

Never invent deploy IDs.

Never invent SHAs.

Never mark VERIFIED without production evidence.

If something cannot be proven, mark it UNVERIFIED and continue fixing the remaining items.
